roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOT TO CONTINUE - FILED AT INSISTENCE
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL:TO MODIFY RELEASE ORDER/NP/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:CURFEW IMPOSED ON 12-21-18 IS TERMINATED/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:THE 01-07-19 HEARING IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVESTHE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 01-08-19/SAORD/SA2:GOLDEN GATE AVENUE& LARKIN STREET, SF/SAORD3/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
